candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; represents revenue from customers and matches top-line sales definition.
Includes revenue plus other income; broader than pure sales but can serve as fallback if primary revenue line is missing in some years.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for total sales.
Interest income is financial, not operating revenue; incorrect for total revenue.
Earnings measure after expenses, not revenue.
Income tax, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow hedges, reclassified to income statement
candidates.why: OCI reclassification, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Liability for unearned revenue, not the revenue flow itself.

variables.notes: Uses the main customer revenue line as primary REVT and the broader total revenue-and-income line as a fallback in case of label changes over time.

candidates.why: Personnel costs likely include both production and overhead staff; not a clean COGS measure given separate SG&A line exists.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly classified within SG&A, not COGS.
Direct cost of materials used in production; best proxy for COGS among available lines.
Mixed operating overhead and possibly some production costs; better suited as SG&A than pure COGS.
SG&A by definition, not COGS.
R&D, not cost of goods sold.
Overhead-type operating expense, not direct production cost.
Financial expense, not COGS.
Balance sheet stock of raw materials, not period expense.
Asset; not a direct production cost line.
Intangible asset, not period COGS.

variables.notes: Selects the direct production cost line ‘Raw materials’ as COGS; other candidates are overhead or non-COGS items.

candidates.why: General personnel costs; likely includes overhead staff but also some production; considered only if no explicit SG&A line existed.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation component; valid SG&A component but not needed if a single consolidated SG&A line is used.
Broad operating overhead bucket; potential SG&A component if no explicit SG&A line existed.
Explicit consolidated SG&A line with non-empty values in some years; per rules, use this single row when present and populated.
General operating costs; may mix COGS and SG&A; only a fallback if SG&A line absent.
Generic share-based compensation label; not clearly tied only to SG&A in this table.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A line exists and is populated in some years, so it alone is selected per the SG&A hierarchy rules.

candidates.why: Clearly labeled R&D expense with populated values; primary R&D line.
Alternate R&D label, currently all NaN but may hold values in other periods; good secondary fallback.
Balance sheet intangible, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Uses the main R&D expense line with an alternate R&D label as a fallback for potential historical label changes.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; matches definition of XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; valid interest expense if main line missing for some years.
Interest capitalized to assets; included as a lower-priority fallback if expensed interest is not available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; good additional fallback label.
Balance sheet debt, not an interest expense flow.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provides a priority list of interest expense labels, preferring the general interest expense line, then lease-related interest, then capitalized interest as last resort.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value equity instruments
candidates.why: Income statement fair value change, not an equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Earnings attributable to equity holders, not book equity itself.
Component of equity but not the total shareholders’ equity measure.
Part of equity (OCI), not total equity attributable to shareholders.
Equity attributable to shareholders; matches requirement to exclude non-controlling interests when available.
Total equity including any non-controlling interests; only used if shareholders’ equity / owners’ equity not available.
Duplicate label for total equity; same considerations as 'Total equity'.

variables.notes: Chooses ‘Shareholders’ equity’ as equity attributable to owners, which correctly excludes any potential non-controlling interests from BE.
No line for non-controlling interests or minority interest appears in the balance sheet preview, so MIB is treated as zero.
